name: lowlands-video-polish
task: Repair the Lowlands SEO video campaign so the deliverables are professional, animated, brand-consistent, YouTube SEO optimized, and Missinglettr-ready. Use the existing campaign assets in E:\lowlands\client-content\drive-lowlands-pics-2026-07-17 and the generated package in E:\lowlands\video-campaigns\lowlands-missinglettr-seo-2026-07. Diagnose why the first render feels plain, then specify and execute a better motion/design pass using available local tooling without adding unnecessary dependencies.
playbook_description: Review a pull request for bugs, regressions, security, and missing tests.

alternates.description: Prepare, debug, or review deployment and release flow.
Final product-quality pass for professional fit, finish, consistency, and obvious rough edges.

workflow.output: findings ordered by severity with file references
workflow.validation: use git diff, tests, or static checks as available
workflow.recovery: if no PR is available, ask for branch, diff, or PR URL

steps.selection_reason: best installed match (60) for code review

steps.reason: Check trust boundaries, secrets, injection, and auth gaps.
steps.selection_reason: best installed match (110) for security review

steps.reason: Check that changed behavior has regression coverage.
